name: scientific-protocol
description: Claim-centric protocol for scientific publication, replication, review, and reward.

scripts.build: bash script/run-with-node22-env.sh hardhat clean && bash script/run-with-node22-env.sh hardhat compile && npm run generate:contracts
scripts.build:package: npm run build && bash script/run-with-node22-env.sh tsc -p tsconfig.package.json
scripts.lint: npm run lint:biome && npm run lint:prettier && npm run lint:shell
scripts.lint:biome: bash script/run-with-node22-env.sh npx biome check --diagnostic-level=error --files-ignore-unknown=true src test script hardhat.config.ts package.json tsconfig.json biome.json .prettierrc.json
scripts.lint:shell: bash -c 'for file in script/*.sh; do bash -n "$file"; done'
scripts.format: npm run format:biome && npm run format:prettier
scripts.format:biome: bash script/run-with-node22-env.sh npx biome check --write --files-ignore-unknown=true src test script hardhat.config.ts package.json tsconfig.json biome.json .prettierrc.json
scripts.generate:contracts: bash script/run-with-node22-env.sh node --import tsx script/generate-contract-artifacts.ts && bash script/run-with-node22-env.sh npx biome format --write src/generated/contracts.ts
scripts.test:all: npm run test:forge && HOME=$PWD SP_REQUIRE_DB_TESTS=1 npm test
scripts.deploy: bash script/run-with-node22-env.sh hardhat run --network localhost script/deploy-protocol.ts
